name: claude-code-nonstop
description: Keep Claude Code going across usage limits — a panel toggle that pings Claude to continue and, when you hit a rate limit, waits it out and resumes automatically when the window reopens.

nightShift.autoInject.description: Automatically inject into Claude Code on startup and re-inject after updates.

nightShift.pingText.description: The message sent to Claude on each ping.

nightShift.pollMs.description: How often (ms) the webview checks Claude's state.

nightShift.maxRuntimeMs.description: Max shift length in ms (0 = no limit). Rate-limit sleep time is not counted.

nightShift.maxPings.description: Max pings per shift (0 = no limit).

nightShift.quietHours.description: Window during which no pings are sent, e.g. "23:00-07:00" (supports crossing midnight). Empty = disabled.

nightShift.onQuestion.description: What to do when Claude asks a clarifying question: stop the shift and wait, or send a neutral answer.

nightShift.questionAnswer.description: Neutral answer sent when onQuestion = answer.

nightShift.doneStallPings.description: Consecutive pings with no meaningful new output before declaring the task done.

nightShift.sentinelDoneDetection.description: Append a sentinel instruction to pings so Claude signals completion reliably.

nightShift.rateLimitFallbackMs.description: How long to wait when a rate-limit reset time cannot be determined.

nightShift.reinjectCheckHours.description: How often (hours) to re-check/re-inject after Claude Code updates (0 = disabled).

nightShift.userActivityPauseMs.description: Pause pinging for this long after detecting real user activity in the input.

nightShift.debug.description: Enable verbose recon/debug logging in the injected webview script.
